summary.lv: Ubiquiti Rīgas R&D meklē iOS izstrādātāju ar zināšanām Swift, SwiftUI un Apple dizaina principos, lai veidotu lietotnes plašai auditorijai.
summary.en: Ubiquiti's Riga R&D team is hiring an iOS developer skilled in Swift, SwiftUI and Apple's design principles to build apps used by millions.
